primaryUse: TypeScript rigor, explanation-first pedagogy, exercise design, and type-system taste.

reusePolicy.summary: Use public articles and licensed open-source repos as source anchors. Paid course material is out of scope.
reusePolicy.codeReuse: MIT-licensed repositories can be reused according to their licenses.
reusePolicy.transcripts: Use public captions or transcripts for summary with attribution only.

sources.title: Total TypeScript
sources.license: site/copyright; public pages reference-only; paid course material out of scope
sources.notes: Primary public teaching surface; use public articles and free material only.

sources.title: Matt Pocock YouTube channel
sources.license: platform/copyright; captions are reference-only when available

sources.title: mattpocock/skills
sources.notes: Public skills repository; re-check license before reuse.

gaps: Paid Total TypeScript course transcripts and exercises are not copied or ingested.
